examples: Tom got this letter late yesterday and then went frantic trying to find copies of last year's accounts.
They made frantic attempts to revive him.
Things are frantic in the office right now.
Haymarket's frantic, rackety Chop Chop (chop-chop.co.uk) serves some of the best dumplings I've tasted outside Hong Kong.
We can too easily imagine the flickering skin, the snorting and pawing, the frantic runs at the fence.
